nodes.label: Index
nodes.description: Selects which output slot receives the value (0-7, integer)

nodes.label: Value
nodes.description: The value to route to the selected output

nodes.label: Bounds Check
nodes.description: Checks index is within valid range (0 to NumParameters-1)

nodes.label: Route to Output
nodes.description: Sends value to selected output via callWithRuntimeIndex()

nodes.label: Modulation Outputs
nodes.description: Multiple output slots (normalised), only one receives value at a time
